data.title: Tariff reversal benefits Scotch Whisky sales, lifting the burden of a 10% tax on American imports and boosting British exports worldwide.
data.description: British exports were facing a setback due to a 10 percent tax imposed on American imports. Despite witnessing a rise in sales in India, China, and other nations, the economy was being impacted by the tax on imports from the US.

data.title: Senators Warren, Wyden question Commerce Sec. Lutnick on Tether loans to Children’s Trust. Bloomberg reported Lutnick's sale.
data.description: Senators Elizabeth Warren and Ron Wyden, both Democrats from Massachusetts and Oregon respectively, sent a letter to Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick and Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino. They are seeking details about loans provided by Tether to a trust linked to Lutnick's children. In March, Bloomberg disclosed that Lutnick divested his shares in Cantor Fitzgerald, a financial services company, involving his four children in the transaction. The senators are inquiring about the specifics of this financial arrangement.

data.title: Strengthening the Digital Infrastructure Backbone for AI: Zayo Completes Acquisition of Crown Castle’s Fiber Solutions Business
data.description: Zayo, a prominent digital infrastructure provider, has finalized the acquisition of Crown Castle's Fiber Solutions business. This acquisition bolsters Zayo's metro fiber footprint and enterprise presence in crucial U.S. markets. With the rise in demand for AI and cloud infrastructure, this move enhances one of the sector's largest fiber networks, solidifying the digital infrastructure backbone for forthcoming advancements. This acquisition is set to significantly expand Zayo's reach with important numbers including an increase in its metro fiber footprint and a wider enterprise presence across key U.S. markets.

data.title: Hammes Healthcare names Chris Stanley a partner
data.description: In Milwaukee on May 1, 2026, Hammes Healthcare, a prominent consulting and project delivery services provider, announced Chris Stanley as a new partner. This appointment highlights Stanley's exceptional leadership in healthcare consulting and development within the organization, leading to notable growth and expansion.

data.title: JEWISH AMERICAN HERITAGE MONTH STARTS MAY 1
data.description: In May 2026, the Jewish American Heritage Month (JAHM) will commence in Philadelphia, featuring a month-long celebration in honor of the Jewish American people. The event aims to promote awareness and appreciation of the rich history and culture of Jewish Americans. Through educational programs, events, and various offerings, JAHM seeks to counter antisemitism and foster greater understanding within the community. The celebration will include a range of activities showcasing the contributions of Jewish Americans to society. Join us throughout the month to commemorate this important occasion.

data.title: Qaelon Medical Extends Leak Detection Beyond the OR with Surgical Intelligence Leader FluidAI Medical
data.description: Qaelon Medical has recently revealed a new partnership with FluidAI Medical, a prominent surgical recovery organization, to establish a continuous surgical data ecosystem. Covering various stages of the surgical process, this collaboration is set to revolutionize the field. This partnership comes as a promising endeavor in the medical industry, aiming to streamline surgical procedures and enhance patient outcomes.

data.title: PRE® BRANDS CELEBRATES NATIONAL BEEF MONTH WITH PORTFOLIO OF LEAN, GRASS-FED AND FINISHED BEEF RECIPES FOR MAY ENTERTAINING
data.description: As we transition from Cinco de Mayo festivities to celebrating Mother's Day and enjoying Spring picnics, Pre Brands is shining a spotlight on uncomplicated, top-notch beef recipes perfect for seasonal get-togethers and daily dining. Based in Chicago, the company aims to emphasize simple, high-quality beef options during National Beef Month this May. Specializing in lean, grass-fed, and grass-finished beef, Pre Brands is a prominent player in the industry. Offering a variety of delicious recipes and products, Pre Brands is dedicated to providing consumers with tasty and nutritious options. Whether it's a special occasion or a regular family meal, Pre Brands has something for everyone to enjoy.

data.title: Jo Malone London Launches New Hair & Body Wash to the Cypress & Grapevine collection
data.description: In London on May 1, 2026, a popular fragrance brand, Jo Malone London, has introduced new additions to its Cypress & Grapevine collection. The expansion includes a 30ml version of the sophisticated cologne and a multi-purpose hair & body wash. These new products aim to offer a variety of ways to enjoy the aromatic notes of the scent.

data.title: Vector Science & Therapeutics Files Provisional Patent for Novel Microneedle Catheter Platform for Intratumoral Drug Delivery
data.description: A new platform has been introduced that combines three research techniques to address the electrical characteristics of tumor biology in pancreatic cancer. The company, Vector Science & Therapeutics, disclosed on May 1, 2026, the submission of a provisional patent application. The stock symbol for the company is TSXV: PAIN.

data.title: Trinity Biotech Appoints Jerry Lydon to Lead North America Commercial Operations
data.description: The recent appointment contributes to the improvement of revenue quality and profitability as the company enhances its operational structure. This move comes at a critical juncture as the company aims to capitalize on its revamped operational base to drive growth. The appointment is expected to have a considerable impact on the company's financial performance, boosting revenue and profitability numbers.

data.title: National Pediatric Cancer Foundation Awards $1 Million Grant to Advance Breakthrough Research for Rare Pediatric Cancer
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on May 1st, 2026, the National Pediatric Cancer Foundation (NPCF) has granted $1 million to JinSeok Park, PhD from Children's Hospital Los Angeles. The funding will aid in research focusing on Metastatic Fusion‑positive Rhabdomyosarcoma, with an aim to further mechanistic and translational studies in this field.

data.title: Linden Creek Expands Luxury Home Staging and Interior Design Services to Charleston, SC
data.description: A new franchise location of Linden Creek, a upscale interior design and home staging company based in Raleigh, North Carolina, has opened in Charleston, SC, to cater to the broader Lowcountry area. This recent expansion marks a significant development for the company, as it broadens its reach to serve a new market.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rises As Apple Jumps On Earnings; Roblox, Sandisk, Western Digital Dive (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase in value, mainly due to Apple's positive earnings report. However, Roblox, Sandisk, and Western Digital saw significant declines in their stock prices. The overall trend in the stock market today was a rise in the Dow, driven by Apple's strong performance, while Roblox, Sandisk, and Western Digital faced notable decreases. This news was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Track Group Inc. Announces Completion of Comprehensive Recapitalization and Debt Refinancing
data.description: Substantial transactions have led to a notable reduction in debt and extension of debt maturity, ultimately aligning ownership for long-term value creation. These financial maneuvers have resulted in a significant deleverage of the balance sheet, with total debt decreasing by [insert specific amount] and debt maturity extended by [insert specific timeframe] years. The reorganization of ownership structure sets the stage for sustained value growth in the long run.

data.title: DOSE PARTNERS WITH JUICE PRESS TO DEBUT LIMITED-TIME SMOOTHIE, BRINGING CLINICALLY-BACKED WELLNESS TO EVERYDAY RITUALS
data.description: Throughout the month of May 2026, the Dose of Vitality smoothie infused with Dose for your Liver® supplement will be offered at all Juice Press stores across the nation. This daily ritual aims to promote lasting vitality and is supported by clinical research. New York-based Dose, a reputable supplement brand, is leading the initiative to redefine daily health practices.
